creator: janssen@rendo.dekooi.nl
text:
While watching tv in X and apm standby modus kicks in 
(could also be the screensaver but I doubt that, that 
has happened before )

involved hardware :


chip3: <Intel 82371AB Power management controller> rev 0x02 on pci0.7.3
bktr0: <BrookTree 848> rev 0x11 int a irq 9 on pci0.9.0
bktr0: Hauppauge Model 56104 E1

How-To-Repeat: Just watch the tv in X and wait for apm modus to kick in
